case_title: GARY MARINKOVICH VS. ROBERTO GONZALES JR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF GARY MARINKOVICH IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM WITH SUPPORT LIZA MURAWSKI. DEFENDANT ROBERTO GONZALES JR. IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS ROBERTO GONZALES SENIOR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINKOVICH, GARY
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINKOVICH, GARY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2022 - JUDGMENT.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0522527D006, TAG # 036926 BY DEFENDANT GONZALES JR, ROBERTO
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD AT WINDOW-BROUGHT TO DEPT 506
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -LIZA MARIE MURAWSKI TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PLANTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINKOVICH, GARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARINKOVICH, GARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALES JR, ROBERTO $1,126.86 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,201.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY MARINKOVICH, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES JR, ROBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY MARINKOVICH, GARY GONZALES JR, ROBERTO
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT GONZALES JR, ROBERTO
(SC-145)JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS TO PROCESS -REQUEST FORWARDED TO ACCT. DEPT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINKOVICH, GARY
